case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION vs. BUSTAMANTE, ROMEO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHRIS KEMBY FILED RE: COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION III, AS ASSIGNEE OF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES
